temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a dark green shirt stares forward with a wide-eyed, shocked expression. The scene is dimly lit with a red and green hue. In the background, a man in a light-colored suit and a floral shirt suddenly appears, pointing a handgun directly at the camera with a menacing grin. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a high-stakes, violent confrontation, introducing the protagonist and the antagonist.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A sudden, loud, and dramatic orchestral swell begins, building tension.)
(00:03-00:05) The man in the green shirt reacts with terror, ducking down behind a table laden with white, fluffy objects that resemble traditional Chinese buns or dumplings. The man in the suit follows up, firing the gun twice with a crazed expression as he runs past. (Storyline: The conflict escalates as the gunman begins firing, forcing the protagonist to take cover and initiating a chase or shootout.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic music continues, punctuated by two loud gunshots.)
